# experiments.fragmentation_experiment { #tspaint.experiments.fragmentation_experiment }

```python
tspaint.experiments.fragmentation_experiment(
    n_admix=10,
    n_ref=10,
    sequence_length=5000000.0,
    T_admix=200.0,
    Ne=1000,
    T_split=5000.0,
    f_A=0.5,
    recombination_rate=1e-08,
    mutation_rate=4e-07,
    deadband=DEFAULT_DEADBAND,
    tol=100000.0,
    seed=1,
    include_rfmix=True,
)
```

Fragmentation / tract-length fidelity of hard segmentations vs. the true tracts.

Matters because downstream admixture-pulse dating reads the segment-length
distribution: ``ratio`` (inferred / true switch density) ≠ 1 biases the inferred
pulse (>1 older from fragmentation, <1 younger from over-smoothing; CLAUDE.md §9).
On one simulated admixture (true ARG) compares tspaint ``argmax``, tspaint with a
confidence ``deadband``, ``nearest_reference``, and — if the rfmix binary is present
— RFMix native (``.msp`` Viterbi).

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**n_admix**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [10]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Number of admixed-query and per-source-reference individuals.

<code>[**n_ref**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [10]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Number of admixed-query and per-source-reference individuals.

<code>[**sequence_length**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[optional](`optional`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [5000000.0]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   msprime admixture-scenario parameters.

<code>[**T_admix**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[optional](`optional`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [5000000.0]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   msprime admixture-scenario parameters.

<code>[**Ne**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[optional](`optional`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [5000000.0]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   msprime admixture-scenario parameters.

<code>[**T_split**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[optional](`optional`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [5000000.0]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   msprime admixture-scenario parameters.

<code>[**f_A**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[optional](`optional`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [5000000.0]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   msprime admixture-scenario parameters.

<code>[**recombination_rate**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[optional](`optional`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [5000000.0]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   msprime admixture-scenario parameters.

<code>[**mutation_rate**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [4e-07]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Mutation rate for the sites RFMix needs.

<code>[**deadband**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [DEFAULT_DEADBAND]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Confidence deadband for the ``tspaint_deadband`` segmentation.

<code>[**tol**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [100000.0]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Breakpoint-matching tolerance (bp) for precision/recall.

<code>[**seed**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [1]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Random seed.

<code>[**include_rfmix**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[bool](`bool`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [True]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   If True (and the rfmix binary is present) also score RFMix native ``.msp``.

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   ``{"seed", "T_admix", "true_switches_per_mb", "n_queries", "methods"}`` where ``methods`` maps each method name to its ``_seg_metrics`` dict augmented with a ``ratio`` (inferred / true switch density).
